person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Daughter of John & Hope (Howland) Chipman, her maternal grandparents were John Howland & his wife Elizabeth Tilley both passengers on The Mayflower, 1620.

She first married at Barnstable, John Huckins, who died at Barnstable, 10 Nov. 1678.

She secondly married at Barnstable, 1 Mar. 1683, Deacon Jonathan, son of Henry & Sarah (Hinckley) Cobb.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hope Chipman於1652年8月31日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波時，她的父親John Chipman33歲，母親Hope Howland23歲。她於1670年8月10日與John Huckins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1728年7月26日在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯米德萊包盧享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯米德萊包盧馮 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hope Chipman于1652年8月31日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波时，她的父亲John Chipman33岁，母亲Hope Howland23岁。她于1670年8月10日与John Huckins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1728年7月26日在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯米德萊包盧享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯米德萊包盧馮 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Chipman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Chapman
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

nameMeanings.name: Hope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (Old English hopa) denoting the quality, in particular the Christian quality of expectation in the resurrection and in eternal life. The name was created by the Puritans and has been one of their most successful coinages.

en.lifeSummary: When Hope Chipman was born on 31 August 1652, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Chipman, was 33 and her mother, Hope Howland, was 23. She married John Huckins on 10 August 1670, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died on 26 July 1728, in Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 75, and was buried in The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hope Chipman est née le 31 août 1652, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Chipman, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Hope Howland, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Huckins le 10 août 1670, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1728, à Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hope Chipman am 31. August 1652 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chipman 33 und ihre Mutter Hope Howland 23. Sie hat am 10. August 1670 in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America John Huckins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1728 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Chipman è nata il il 31 agosto 1652 nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Chipman, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Hope Howland, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Huckins il 10 agosto 1670, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1728, nel Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hope Chipmanが1652年8月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父John Chipmanは33歳，母Hope Howlandは23歳であった。1670年8月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルでJohn Huckinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1728年7月26日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスミッドレボロウで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスミッドレボロウス グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hope Chipman(이)가 1652년 8월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chipman(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hope Howland(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1670년 8월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 John Huckins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1728년 7월 26일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 미들레버루그h에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 미들레버루그h 테 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hope Chipman nasceu em 31 de agosto de 1652, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Chipman, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Hope Howland, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Huckins em 10 de agosto de 1670, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1728, em Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hope Chipman родилась 31 августа 1652 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Chipman было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Hope Howland, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Huckins 10 августа 1670 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июля 1728 г. в местности миддлебороую, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности т грин, миддлебороую, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hope Chipman nació el 31 de agosto de 1652, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Chipman, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Hope Howland, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Huckins el 10 de agosto de 1670, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1728, en Middleborough, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en The Green, Middleborough, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
